positive: A stylized, symmetrical crest design featuring celestial elements intertwined with stylized forest flora. Center composition shows two opposing constellations cradling a blossoming bioluminescent flower. The aesthetic is Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with sacred geometry, using deep indigo, emerald green, gold leaf accents, and stark black lines for high contrast. Clean, crisp line work with defined silhouettes, perfect for screen printing on apparel. High detail, symmetrical, intricate linework, mystical, ethereal, graphic novel style, clean vector illustration, solid background.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, low detail, noisy, grunge, text, watermark, signature, logo, writing, artifacts, grain, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, photorealistic, gradient, sketch, out of focus
